name: Medtronic plc
description: Medtronic plc is a leading global healthcare technology company that develops, manufactures, and sells device-based medical therapies to healthcare systems, physicians, clinicians, and patients worldwide. Headquartered in Dublin, Ireland, with operational headquarters in Minneapolis, Minnesota, the company focuses on alleviating pain, restoring health, and extending life. Medtronic offers a diverse portfolio of innovative products and services, including cardiac rhythm management, surgical robotics, neurological devices, and diabetes management solutions. By leveraging advanced technologies like artificial intelligence and robotics, Medtronic continues to transform patient care and address some of the world's most complex healthcare challenges.
